description_long: This is a medium-sized, round bowl with a smooth, gently curved profile and a wide open top. The exterior and interior surfaces are uniformly colored, primarily a matte white or light gray, giving it a clean and modern appearance. Two small, subtle protrusions on opposite sides of the rim, possibly serving as pouring spouts or grips, are visible and are slightly tinted pink. The bowl's walls are moderately thick, suggesting durability and everyday utility. There are no visible decorative patterns or textures, and the surface appears unadorned. The bowl is empty and in pristine condition, with no visible chips, cracks, or stains.
description: A smooth, round, matte white bowl with two small pink spouts on opposite sides and a clean, unadorned surface. The bowl is empty and in pristine condition.
description_view_0: A front view of the bowl showing its smooth, round shape and wide open top, with no visible spouts.
description_view_1: A side view revealing one of the small pink spouts protruding from the rim, with the interior and exterior surfaces visible.
description_view_2: A view showing both pink spouts on opposite sides of the rim, emphasizing the bowl's symmetry and open top.
description_view_3: A side view similar to view 1, showing the other pink spout and the bowl's smooth, curved profile.
